---
title: "PS270 Final Project"
author: Ava Menkes
description: "My final project"
output:
  distill::distill_article:
    self_contained: false
---



## Project thoughts

I am interested in exploring data related to...
nuclear testing, and potentially how many people were diangoised with cancer or health effects from U.S. testing in the Marshall Islands.

If that's too specific something just related to proliferation or nonproliferation would be interesting to!
